name: Document Grid — Filter by Type
notes: The type filter is a controlled <select> rendered inside DocumentGrid's header bar; state lives in DocumentGrid.state.filters.fileType (initialized as empty string = 'All Types').
Filtering is purely client-side: changing the select calls handleFilterChange which setState-merges the new fileType into filters; the render path then re-runs filterDocuments() with no API call.
filterDocuments() performs an exact MIME-type match (===) against doc.file_type; selecting 'All Types' (empty string) skips the type check and shows every document.
The active filter label is echoed in the status bar at the bottom of the component (DocumentGrid.jsx:1040) as '· Filter: <mimeType>'.
